fixesVerified.fix: Added max-md:flex-wrap to nav bar inner div
Added max-md:w-full max-md:order-last to right column div
fixesVerified.tsxClass: flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0 max-md:w-full max-md:order-last
fixesVerified.phpClass: flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0 max-md:w-full max-md:order-last

build.details: Build and lint pass with 0 errors. 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in Accordion, Archive (x2), ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero (x2), Tabs — none in Header files.

tsxPhpSync.details: Both new class additions are verbatim identical between HeaderMain.tsx and HeaderMain.php. Nav bar inner: 'flex items-stretch justify-between max-md:flex-wrap' matches on PHP line 63 and TSX line 490. Right column: 'flex flex-col md:gap-6 items-end shrink min-w-0 max-md:w-full max-md:order-last' matches on PHP line 77 and TSX line 518. Automated sync tool passes (0 errors, 1 pre-existing expected depth-1 structure warning).

structureWarning.message: TSX 0 vs PHP 3 elements at depth 1 — pre-existing expected difference. Not a defect.

testPageIntegrity.details: All 9 header instances render without error. Link counts identical to previous QA run — no regressions.

mobileMenuFullWidth.details: Interactive screenshot at 375px with hamburger click confirms the mobile menu expands to full width of the header bar. The right column (containing the nav) wraps to a full-width second row below the logo+toggle row via max-md:flex-wrap on the parent and max-md:w-full max-md:order-last on the right column. Nav items (ABOUT, HEALTH, FINANCIAL WELLBEING) stack vertically across the full header width. The X close icon appears at top-right confirming aria-expanded state toggled. This is the correct behavior — the menu is no longer squeezed into a narrow column.

mobileMenuClosed.details: Closed-state screenshot at 375px shows the collapsed header correctly: IGNITE logo on the left, hamburger icon on the right, both on a single row. No extra height or layout shift in closed state.

desktopLayout.details: Desktop screenshot at 1440px confirms no regressions: IGNITE logo spans both rows (utility row + nav row) on the left across all 9 variations. Utility row (search box + SEP CTA link) appears at top-right. Nav items render horizontally below. max-md:flex-wrap has no effect at desktop widths (md: prefix overrides). max-md:w-full and max-md:order-last are also inert at desktop — right column retains shrink + items-end layout.

accessibility.details: ARIA attributes confirmed on all 9 rendered instances: role='menubar' present (menubar selector found 9/9), button[aria-label='Toggle Main Menu'] present (mobile_toggle found 9/9), nav.header-collapsable with aria-label present (nav_collapsable found 9/9). Interactive screenshot confirmed aria-expanded toggled (hamburger icon changed to X close icon after click). max-md:order-last on right column is a visual reorder only — DOM order (logo, right-col, toggle) unchanged, preserving tab order.
accessibility.tabOrderNote: max-md:order-last is a CSS visual reorder. DOM order preserved: logo → right-column → toggle button. Tab order follows DOM order, not visual order. This is acceptable since the right column is not keyboard-interactive in collapsed state (pointer-events-none, max-h-0, opacity-0).

regressions.details: All 5 selectors from prior QA run present on all 9 instances (flex_wrap_inner, right_col_full_width, mobile_toggle, menubar, nav_collapsable). Link counts per instance [16,3,4,4,3,4,9,4,3] unchanged. Data attributes correct for all scroll variations. No regressions introduced.

mobileOpen.actions: evaluate click on button[aria-label='Toggle Main Menu'] + 800ms wait

max-md:w-full max-md:order-last on right column rendered on all 9 instances
Mobile menu expands to full width of header bar when opened
Nav items stack vertically full-width in open state

Desktop layout: no regressions, logo spans both rows, utility row + nav correct
